mapper.select:
/* loginMapper.selectLogin */ SELECT '' || COUNT(1) ID_CNT , '' || SUM(DECODE(PASS, #{pass, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, 0)) PASS_CNT , '' || SUM(DECODE(NVL(OTP,0), #{otp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, 0)) OTP_CNT , '' || SUM(DECODE(A.USG_YN, 'S', 1, 0)) AS STOP_CNT , MAX(A.USR_NM) USR_NM , MAX(A.USR_ID) USR_ID , MAX(USG_END_DT) USG_END_DT , MAX(MSK_AUTH_YN) MSK_AUTH_YN , MAX(A.ORGN_ID) ORGN_ID , MAX(B.ORGN_NM) ORGN_NM , MAX(B.TYPE_CD) TYPE_CD , MAX(B.ORGN_LVL_CD) ORGN_LVL_CD , MAX(B.LOGIS_CNTER_YN) LOGIS_CNTER_YN , MAX('' || A.MNGR_RULE) MNGR_RULE , MAX(B.TYPE_DTL_CD1) TYPE_DTL_CD1 , DECODE(MAX(C.CD_DSC), NULL, 'N', 'Y') ORG_CHG_YN , MAX((SELECT CGCM.USG_YN FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST CGCM WHERE GRP_ID = 'DEV0000' AND CD_VAL = 'OTP')) AS USE_OTP
, MAX( CASE WHEN TO_DATE(PASS_LAST_RVISN_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') + 90 < SYSDATE THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ) AS PASS_CHG_YN , MAX( CASE WHEN NVL(A.PASS_ATMT_NUM,0) > 2 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ) AS OTP_INIT_YN , MAX((SELECT USG_YN FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'DEV0000' AND CD_VAL = 'OTP1TYM')) AS OTP_ONETYM , MAX( CASE WHEN NVL(LAST_LOGIN_DT, SYSDATE-1) > TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ) AS TODAY_LOGIN_YN , MAX(NVL((SELECT USG_YN FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'DEV0002' AND CD_VAL = UPPER(#{usrId, jdbcType=VARCHAR})),'N')) AS OTP_AUTH_YN
, MAX(( SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*), 0, 'N', 1, 'Y') FROM CMN_USG_GRP_ASGN_MST CUGAM WHERE CUGAM.GRP_ID = 'admin' AND CUGAM.USR_ID = A.USR_ID )) AS ADMIN_YN , MAX(PASS_INIT) AS FIRST_YN , CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(MAX(A.USR_ID)) AS ENC_USER_ID , MAX(DECODE(A.STATUS_REQ , NULL , 'N' , A.STATUS_REQ )) STATUS_REQ , MAX(NVL((SELECT USG_YN FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'DEV0000' AND CD_VAL = 'UNIQUE'), 'N')) AS UNIQUE_YN FROM CMN_USR_MST A , ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST B , CMN_GRP_CD_MST C WHERE A.USR_ID = UPPER(#{usrId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND A.ORGN_ID = B.ORGN_ID(+) AND A.USG_YN IN ('Y', 'S') AND A.ORGN_ID = C.CD_VAL(+) AND C.GRP_ID(+) = 'CMN0041' AND C.USG_YN(+) = 'Y'
AND A.ATTC_SCTN_CD <> '30' AND ( A.USG_STRT_DT IS NULL OR TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') >= A.USG_STRT_DT) AND ( A.USG_END_DT IS NULL OR TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') <= A.USG_END_DT)

/* loginMapper.selectLoginChk */ SELECT DECODE(PASS, #{pass, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , 'Y', 'N') PASS_YN , DECODE(USG_YN, 'S', 'Y', 'N') AS STOP_YN , MBLPHN_NUM , ATTC_SCTN_CD
, CASE WHEN ATTC_SCTN_CD > 10 THEN ( CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MI') BETWEEN ETC1 AND ETC2 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) ELSE 'Y' END AS OPEN_YN , (SELECT USG_YN FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'DEV0000' AND CD_VAL = 'OTP1TYM') AS OTP_ONETYM , NVL((SELECT USG_YN FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'DEV0002' AND CD_VAL = #{usrId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}),'N') AS OTP_AUTH_YN , ( CASE WHEN NVL(LAST_LOGIN_DT, SYSDATE-1) > TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ) AS TODAY_LOGIN_YN
, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ETC1, 'HH24MI'), 'HH24:MI') AS OPEN_START , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ETC2, 'HH24MI'), 'HH24:MI') AS OPEN_END , DECODE(STATUS_REQ , NULL , 'N' , STATUS_REQ ) STATUS_REQ , PASS_ERR_NUM , OTP_CHK_NUM FROM CMN_USR_MST , (SELECT ETC1, ETC2 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'DEV0000' AND CD_VAL = 'OPEN') WHERE USR_ID = UPPER(#{usrId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND USG_YN IN ('Y', 'S')
AND (USG_STRT_DT IS NULL OR TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') >= USG_STRT_DT) AND (USG_END_DT IS NULL OR TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') <= USG_END_DT)

/* loginMapper.selectMacLoginChk */ SELECT 'Y' PASS_YN, CASE WHEN ATTC_SCTN_CD BETWEEN ETC1 AND ETC2 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END TARGET_YN FROM CMN_USR_MST, (SELECT ETC1, ETC2 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'DEV0000' AND CD_VAL = 'MAC') WHERE 1 = 1 AND USG_YN IN ('Y','S') AND ROWNUM = 1

/* loginMapper.selectMacLoginChk */ SELECT DECODE(PASS, #{pass, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'Y', 'N') PASS_YN, CASE WHEN ATTC_SCTN_CD BETWEEN ETC1 AND ETC2 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END TARGET_YN FROM CMN_USR_MST, (SELECT ETC1, ETC2 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'DEV0000' AND CD_VAL = 'MAC') WHERE USR_ID = UPPER(#{usrId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND USG_YN IN ('Y','S')
/* loginMapper.selectMacChkInfo */ SELECT CD_VAL, CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'DEV0001'

/* loginMapper.getUpMngTel */ SELECT A.ORGN_NM , B.USR_ID ,C.MBLPHN_NUM , DECODE(A.TYPE_CD , '20' , '대리점' , '판매점') AS ORG_TYPE FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST A ,CMN_USR_MST B /*정지사용자*/ ,CMN_USR_MST C /*매니저*/ WHERE A.ORGN_ID = B.ORGN_ID AND A.ADM_USER_ID = C.NRDS_ID AND B.USR_ID = #{usrId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

/* loginMapper.selectUsrChk */ SELECT USG_YN , MBLPHN_NUM , ATTC_SCTN_CD
, ORGN_ID FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = UPPER(#{usrId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND MBLPHN_NUM = #{ctn} AND USG_YN IN ('Y', 'S')

SELECT '' || SUM(DECODE(NVL(OTP,0), #{otp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, 0)) OTP_CNT , 'Y' AS USE_OTP
, MAX( CASE WHEN NVL(A.PASS_ATMT_NUM,0) > 2 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ) AS OTP_INIT_YN
, MAX(PASS_INIT) AS FIRST_YN FROM CMN_USR_MST A WHERE A.USR_ID = UPPER(#{usrId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND A.MBLPHN_NUM = UPPER(#{ctn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND A.USG_YN IN ('Y', 'S')
AND A.ATTC_SCTN_CD <> '30' AND ( A.USG_STRT_DT IS NULL OR TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') >= A.USG_STRT_DT) AND ( A.USG_END_DT IS NULL OR TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') <= A.USG_END_DT)
/* loginMapper.selectUsrPwdReset */ SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM CMN_USR_PWD_RESET WHERE USR_ID = UPPER(#{usrId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND STATUS NOT IN ('Y','C')
